languages.text: "Я находил общий язык с эльдарами, друкари и некоторыми другими видами ксеносов. Но с офицерами мое общение обычно сводилось к приказам".
"I have found common ground with Aeldari, Drukhari, and a few other xenos species. But with officers, my interactions have typically been limited to issuing orders."
languages.original_text: "Я находил общий язык с эльдарами, друкари и некоторыми другими видами ксеносов. Но с офицерами мое общение обычно сводилось к приказам".

traits.locale_text: "I have found common ground with Aeldari, Drukhari, and certain other xenos species. With officers, however, my communication has typically been limited to issuing orders."
"I have found common ground with Aeldari, Drukhari, and certain other xenos species. With officers, however, my communication has typically been limited to issuing orders."
"I have found common ground with Aeldari, Drukhari, and a few other xenos species. But with officers, my interactions have typically been limited to issuing orders."
"I have found common ground with Aeldari, Drukhari, and a few other xenos species. But with officers, my interactions have typically been limited to issuing orders."

languages.text: "Ich habe mit Aeldari, Drukhari und einigen anderen Xenos-Spezies eine gemeinsame Basis gefunden. Offizieren habe ich allerdings meist nur Befehle erteilt."
languages.original_text: "I have found common ground with Aeldari, Drukhari, and a few other xenos species. But with officers, my interactions have typically been limited to issuing orders."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe mit Aeldari, Drukhari und einigen anderen Xenos-Spezies eine gemeinsame Basis gefunden. Offizieren habe ich allerdings meist nur Befehle erteilt."

languages.text: « J'ai su trouver un terrain d'entente avec les Aeldaris, les Drukharis et quelques autres espèces xénos. Mais avec les officiers, je me suis généralement contenté de donner des ordres. »
languages.original_text: "I have found common ground with Aeldari, Drukhari, and a few other xenos species. But with officers, my interactions have typically been limited to issuing orders."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai su trouver un terrain d'entente avec les Aeldaris, les Drukharis et quelques autres espèces xénos. Mais avec les officiers, je me suis généralement contenté de donner des ordres. »

languages.text: «He encontrado aspectos en común con Aeldari, Drukhari y otras pocas especies de xenos, pero, con los oficiales, mi interacción suele limitarse a dar órdenes».
languages.original_text: "I have found common ground with Aeldari, Drukhari, and a few other xenos species. But with officers, my interactions have typically been limited to issuing orders."

traits.locale_text: «He encontrado aspectos en común con Aeldari, Drukhari y otras pocas especies de xenos, pero, con los oficiales, mi interacción suele limitarse a dar órdenes».

languages.text: "Aeldari, Drukhari ve diğer birkaç zeno türüyle ortak bir zemin buldum. Ancak subaylarla etkileşimim genellikle emir vermekle sınırlı kaldı."
languages.original_text: "I have found common ground with Aeldari, Drukhari, and a few other xenos species. But with officers, my interactions have typically been limited to issuing orders."

traits.locale_text: "Aeldari, Drukhari ve diğer birkaç zeno türüyle ortak bir zemin buldum. Ancak subaylarla etkileşimim genellikle emir vermekle sınırlı kaldı."

languages.text: “我跟艾达灵族、黑暗灵族，还有另外几种异形，都有共同语言。但跟军官打交道，我一般只下命令。”
languages.original_text: "I have found common ground with Aeldari, Drukhari, and a few other xenos species. But with officers, my interactions have typically been limited to issuing orders."

traits.locale_text: “我跟艾达灵族、黑暗灵族，还有另外几种异形，都有共同语言。但跟军官打交道，我一般只下命令。”

languages.text: 「アエルダリ、ドルクハリ、そして数種の異種族と共通点を見いだした。しかし、将校たちとの交流は、命令を出すことだけだった。」
languages.original_text: "I have found common ground with Aeldari, Drukhari, and a few other xenos species. But with officers, my interactions have typically been limited to issuing orders."

traits.locale_text: 「アエルダリ、ドルクハリ、そして数種の異種族と共通点を見いだした。しかし、将校たちとの交流は、命令を出すことだけだった。」
